204-  (not principle wording).

207-- **Cost overrun.** $10 cap is for the full run; halt at cap and reassess.

ddx-ea3a7e23  closed        P2  [visual-suite] V6 generate principle composite (pressure-test gate) [generate,plan-2026-04-29-vis,principles]
ddx-fdd3ea36  closed        P1  Adopt ddx-agent routing point release: zero-interaction defaults, usable profiles, sharp overrides (DDx-side consumer) [feat-006,feat-010,routing,upstream-agent,design]

What is blocking
1. Missing image-generation skill. The `nano-banana-pro-openrouter` skill is
   referenced from `.crush/skills/` and `.pi/skills/` as symlinks pointing to
   `.agents/skills/nano-banana-pro-openrouter/`, but that target directory does
   not exist in this worktree (only helix-* skills and `ddx` are under
   `.agents/skills/`). Without the skill the generator cannot run.
2. No execution definition registered. `ddx exec list --json` returns `[]`;
   there is no nano-banana-pro-openrouter generator definition, and no
   definition lists `principles-composite` (or any visual artifact id) under
   produces_artifact. `ddx artifact regenerate principles-composite` therefore
   fails with "artifact \"principles-composite\" not found in document graph"
   — the artifact is not registered, and even if it were, selectArtifactGenerator
   in cli/cmd/artifact.go:99 would error with "no generator definition or
   generated_by provenance".
3. Sidecar metadata not authored. The plan calls for
   `principles-composite.{prompt.md,png,png.ddx.yaml}` co-located with the V5
   prompts, with `depends_on` and `generated_by` edges. The `.ddx.yaml` sidecar
   for the (yet-unrendered) composite cannot be written without a real
   `generated_by` run record, which only the substrate run produces.

What a follow-up attempt would need (in order)
1. A predecessor bead that installs / vendors the `nano-banana-pro-openrouter`
   skill into `.agents/skills/` so the broken symlinks resolve. Today this
   skill is missing from the execute-bead worktree.
2. A predecessor bead that authors a `ddx exec define` execution definition
   for the nano-banana-pro-openrouter generator with
   `produces_artifact: principles-composite` (and, ideally, the six standalone
   principle artifact IDs as well so V7 can reuse it).
3. A predecessor bead that registers the `principles-composite` artifact in
   the document graph (sidecar with id, depends_on .stitch/DESIGN.md and the
   six principle prompts, media_type image/png) so `ddx artifact regenerate`
   resolves it.

Once those three preconditions hold, V6 collapses to: author
docs/helix/00-discover/visuals/principles-composite.prompt.md (referencing the
six existing principle prompts and DESIGN.md tokens), then run
`ddx artifact regenerate principles-composite`. The composite prompt should
explicitly assemble the lever metaphor — beam (P1), cyclic motion (P2),
interchangeable handles (P3), non-uniform load (P4), receipts trail (P5),
fulcrum at the human-AI seam (P6) — so the pressure-test reads on the first
render. Budget tracking ($10 cap, $1.50/image halt) starts when the substrate
run actually executes.

Recommendation: file three predecessor beads above (skill-install, exec-define,
artifact-register), block ddx-ea3a7e23 on them, and re-queue. Do not escalate
to a stronger model — model capability is not the constraint here.

ddx-1848bbaa  closed        P2  [visual-suite] V8 author 4 tool-graphic prompts [prompt,plan-2026-04-29-vis,tools]

input.content:
V9 generate 4 tool graphics + composite — no changes (hard-blocked, same as V6/ddx-ea3a7e23)

What is done
- Verified the bead's stated hard-block precondition still holds: V9 cannot run for
  exactly the same infrastructure reasons that closed V6 (ddx-ea3a7e23) as no_changes.
- Confirmed by inspection of this worktree:
  1. .agents/skills/nano-banana-pro-openrouter/ does not exist. Only ddx and helix-*
     skills are present under .agents/skills/. The image-generation skill referenced
     by the plan's generator pipeline is still missing.
  2. `ddx exec list --json` returns `[]`. There is no nano-banana-pro-openrouter
     execution definition registered, and nothing lists any tool-graphic artifact
     under produces_artifact.
  3. `ddx artifact regenerate tools-composite` fails with
     "artifact \"tools-composite\" not found in document graph" — the artifact is
     not registered. selectArtifactGenerator (cli/cmd/artifact.go:99) would also
     error with "no generator definition or generated_by provenance".
  4. The V8 sibling bead (ddx-1848bbaa "author 4 tool-graphic prompts") is closed,
     but docs/helix/00-discover/visuals/ contains only the six principle prompts —
     no tool-graphic prompt files exist. There is no prompt input for V9 to consume
     even if generation infrastructure were available.

What is blocking
1. Missing image-generation skill (nano-banana-pro-openrouter) under
   .agents/skills/. Symlinks under .crush/skills/ and .pi/skills/ point at a
   directory that doesn't exist here.
2. No registered execution definition (`ddx exec list --json` is empty), so
   `ddx artifact regenerate` has no generator to dispatch to.
3. No registered tool-graphic artifacts in the document graph. Without sidecars
   declaring id + media_type + depends_on, regenerate can't resolve them.
4. No tool-graphic prompt sources in docs/helix/00-discover/visuals/, despite
   V8 (ddx-1848bbaa) being closed. V9's contract assumes those prompts exist.
5. The plan explicitly forbids manual prompt-file → image fallbacks
   (plan-2026-04-29-visual-suite.md:255). V9 must run through the artifact
   pipeline or not run at all.

What a follow-up attempt would need (in order)
1. Re-open or supersede V8 (ddx-1848bbaa) — the four tool-graphic prompt files
   it was supposed to author are not in the worktree, so V9's input contract
   is also unmet. Verify the closure was substantive, not a no_changes.
2. Predecessor bead: install / vendor nano-banana-pro-openrouter into
   .agents/skills/ so the broken symlinks resolve.
3. Predecessor bead: author `ddx exec define` for the nano-banana-pro-openrouter
   generator with produces_artifact entries for each tool graphic plus
   tools-composite.
4. Predecessor bead: register the four tool-graphic artifacts and tools-composite
   in the document graph (sidecars with id, media_type image/png, depends_on
   the V8 prompts and DESIGN.md tokens).
5. Once 1–4 hold, V9 collapses to: budget-tracked sequential
   `ddx artifact regenerate <each-tool-graphic>` then
   `ddx artifact regenerate tools-composite`, evaluating each render against
   the bead's acceptance criteria (placement, contrast, mobile crop, alt text,
   file size, metaphor parses without copy, brand-fit / no-kitsch),
   halting at $1.50/image or $10 total.

Recommendation
File the four predecessor beads above, block ddx-297e7b4b on them, and re-queue.
Do not escalate to a stronger model — the constraint is missing infrastructure
and missing inputs, not model capability. This mirrors the V6 (ddx-ea3a7e23)
disposition exactly; resolving the infrastructure unblocks both the principles
and tools lenses simultaneously.

data.text:
Hard-blocked, same as V6 (ddx-ea3a7e23). Verified preconditions still missing in this worktree:

- `.agents/skills/nano-banana-pro-openrouter/` absent
- `ddx exec list --json` → `[]`
- `ddx artifact regenerate tools-composite` → "not found in document graph"
- V8's tool-graphic prompts not present in `docs/helix/00-discover/visuals/`

Wrote `.ddx/executions/20260501T164908-85c06bf9/no_changes_rationale.txt` documenting status, blockers, and the predecessor beads needed (skill install, exec-define, artifact-register, plus re-verify V8 outputs). No commit.
